title: Capacity Forecasting

frontmatter.title: Capacity Forecasting
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of projecting future demand and capacity headroom from telemetry history, with honest uncertainty, and turning forecasts into planning recommendations.

body:
# Skill · Capacity Forecasting

A core intelligence competency: the agent can project demand and capacity from historical telemetry,
quantify the uncertainty around its forecast, and translate the result into a headroom recommendation.

## Conferred by
- [NETINT-220](../schools/network-intelligence/departments/forecasting/courses/netint-220.md)

## Examined by
[Network Intelligence Exam](../benchmarks/netint-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Network Intelligence — Gold](../certifications/network-intelligence-gold.md).
